metaDescription: Qwen3.7-Max (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2026-05 — part of the Qwen-Max line. Text-only reasoning agent flagship with a 1M-token context window and native extend…
overview: Qwen3.7-Max is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen-Max line. Released 2026-05. Alibaba's proprietary, API-only flagship — its largest and most capable text/reasoning model, accessible through Alibaba Cloud Model Studio.

What's notable in this version: Text-only reasoning agent flagship with a 1M-token context window and native extended-thinking mode, built for long-horizon agentic workloads; proprietary, API-only via DashScope/Model Studio. Announced at the 2026 Alibaba Cloud Summit.
